description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a tan polymer stock and pistol grip. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories. The stock is a collapsible type, providing adjustable length for user comfort and adaptability. The magazine is a detachable box style, partially visible beneath the receiver. The barrel is of standard length and appears to have a thread protector or basic muzzle device at the end. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban rifles.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a black metal receiver and barrel, tan collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine. Features a full-length Picatinny rail and a standard barrel with a thread protector.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, tan collapsible stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the tan stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, stock, grip, and magazine from the other side.
